meta.title: ICS/IoT Data ... from the Cloud to the Multi-Edge
meta.description:
Vikas Butaney's session focuses on three areas:
- where OT customers are in the adoption process of data in the cloud
- two case studies on managing data and related cyber risk
- how Cisco is developing products and systems to meet their customers needs

Pull Quote: "We believe visibility is a key issue for cyber security, and we are trying to make it easier and more integrated into the network, rather than something that you have to bolt on or put in as an aftermarket capability."
